cards.name: Hildebeast
abilities: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
cards.flavor_text: In the heart of the Ontarian wilderness, the Hildebeast prowls, a guardian spirit clad in toques and Timbits.

cards.name: Flow Conference
abilities: At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control three or more techs, you gain 1 customer.
{4}, {T}, Sacrifice Flow Conference: Search your library for a founder card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

cards.name: Adam, Archmage of Automation
abilities: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Artifact creatures you control have menace.
At the beginning of your end step, create a 0/0 colorless AI Construct artifact creature token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each AI you control."

cards.name: Riggs, the Stabber
abilities: Whenever Riggs, the Stabber enters the battlefield or attacks, create two 2/2 colorless Security Engineer human creature tokens.
cards.flavor_text: "Would be a shame if someone enabled 2-Factor authentication ... and even more tragic if they didn't survive to appreciate it."

cards.name: Glint the Unthinkable
cards.flavor_text: In a moment of reckless curiosity, Danial, the Poutine Provocateur, dared to capture the unspeakable.

cards.name: Adam, IT Apprentice
abilities: {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.
Whenever you draw or discard a card, create a 1/1 blue Level-1 Tech human creature token.
cards.flavor_text: Confound their politics, Frustrate their knavish tricks, Oh Thee our hopes we fix, God, save us all!
